heading: Exempt motor vehicle transportation in terminal areas
label: 13503 Exempt motor vehicle transportation in terminal areas
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by .section 10523 of this titlePub. L. 104–88, § 102(a)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided in , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 1, 1996Pub. L. 104–88section 2 of Pub. L. 104–88section 1301 of this title
amendments: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by .section 10523 of this titlePub. L. 104–88, § 102(a)

children.label: A
children.text: is a transfer, collection, or delivery;

children.label: i
children.text: a rail carrier subject to jurisdiction under chapter 105;

children.label: ii
children.text: a water carrier subject to jurisdiction under subchapter II of this chapter; or

children.label: iii
children.text: a freight forwarder subject to jurisdiction under subchapter III of this chapter; and

children.label: C
children.text: is incidental to transportation or service provided by the carrier or freight forwarder that is subject to jurisdiction under chapter 105 of this title or under subchapter II or III of this chapter.

children.heading: .—Applicability of other provisions
children.label: 2 .—Applicability of other provisions
children.text: Transportation exempt from jurisdiction under paragraph (1) of this subsection is subject to jurisdiction under chapter 105 when provided by such a rail carrier, under subchapter II of this chapter when provided by such a water carrier, and under subchapter III of this chapter when provided by such a freight forwarder.

children.label: A
children.text: is a transfer, collection, or delivery; and

children.label: i
children.text: a rail carrier subject to jurisdiction under chapter 105 of this title;

children.label: ii
children.text: a motor carrier subject to jurisdiction under this subchapter;

children.label: iii
children.text: a water carrier subject to jurisdiction under subchapter II of this chapter; or

children.label: iv
children.text: a freight forwarder subject to jurisdiction under subchapter III of this chapter.

children.heading: .—Treatment of transportation by principal
children.label: 2 .—Treatment of transportation by principal
children.text: Transportation exempt from jurisdiction under paragraph (1) of this subsection is considered transportation provided by the carrier or service provided by the freight forwarder for whom the transportation was provided and is subject to jurisdiction under chapter 105 of this title when provided for such a rail carrier, under this subchapter when provided for such a motor carrier, under subchapter II of this chapter when provided for such a water carrier, and under subchapter III of this chapter when provided for such a freight forwarder.
